bids.reasoning: This is the opening at t=0.0 with no opponent offers or messages to infer their preferences, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. With no time pressure yet, I should anchor strongly on my best values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, and the opponent’s only offer is the minimum-utility bid for me on every issue, so there is no evidence of meaningful concession yet. I am targeting a very high utility while avoiding an exact repeat of my opening bid, conceding only on my lowest-weight issueA and holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still very early (t=0.04), so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has moved only slightly, from all valueA to improving issueD to valueB, which raises my utility but still remains far from acceptable; I will concede further only on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the higher-weight issues.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession on my lowest-weight issue, issueA. The opponent has only conceded slightly on issueD while keeping issueA-C at valueA, so I will not make major concessions on my high-weight issues yet, especially issueD and issueC.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.935 because it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent’s offers remain quite low for me. Their offers show only small, inconsistent concessions on issueC/issueD, so I will continue conceding only on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the higher-weight issues, especially issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.10 and there is no need to concede on important issues yet. The opponent has made only small and inconsistent concessions, with their best offer to me still quite low, so I will continue conceding only on my lowest-weight issueA while holding issueB, issueC, and issueD at my best values.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.888, since it is still early at t=0.12 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me despite small concessions. Their bids suggest they prefer lower values, and I have already conceded fully on low-weight issueA, so I am now making a modest concession on issueB while holding firm on the more important issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueC and issueD at different times, but they remain very low overall; with no messages to consider, I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issueA and modestly on issueB while holding firm on high-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a still-high utility of about 0.824 by conceding further only on the lower-weight issueB while holding issueC and issueD at my best values. Time is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to make major concessions yet; the opponent’s offers have improved only slightly and remain low-utility for me, with no messages adding reliable information.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.79, since it is early enough to protect my most important issues, especially issueD and issueC. The opponent has made only modest concessions and their offers remain low utility for me, so I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issueB while holding firm on higher-weight issues.

At t=0.20 it is still early enough to protect my high-weight issues, especially issueD and issueC, while continuing some gradual concession. The opponent’s valid offers have improved my utility somewhat but remain far below my prior offers, and they have shown most willingness around low values on issueA/issueB, so I concede further on issueB while holding issueC and issueD at valueF.

I am targeting about 0.71 utility, making a controlled concession on issueC while preserving issueD, my most important issue. At t=0.22 it is still early enough not to concede heavily on issueD, and the opponent’s offers show some willingness to place issueC at valueE while remaining very tough on issueD and lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.65, which is a meaningful concession from my last offer but still well above reservation value this early in the negotiation. The opponent’s offers have gradually improved for me, especially with their latest move to issueD:valueD, so I am responding by conceding one step on my most important issueD while keeping issueC relatively strong and leaving the lower-weight issues at their cheapest valid levels. There are no opponent messages, so I am relying only on the offer pattern.
